title: delphinium linearilobum
intro: Delphinium linearilobum, also known as the linear-lobed delphinium, is a perennial plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) native to the mountainous regions of China. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Delphinium linearilobum are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Delphinium linearilobum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
